name: Cupsy‚ėÖYummy Way
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 non-Tuner monster
For this card's Synchro Summon, you can treat 1 Link-1 monster you control as a Level 1 Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Cupsy‚ėÖYummy Way" once per turn. If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can add 2 "Yummy" monsters from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can return this card to the Extra Deck; Special Summon up to 2 "Yummy" monsters from your GY.
